title: Set admin credentials, add user logo to header/footer

requirements.summary: Add user's logo (user-logo.dim_200x60.png) to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in both Header and Footer components, ensuring both logos display side by side without removing the existing branding
acceptanceCriteria: The user's logo image appears to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in the sticky header
The user's logo image appears to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in the footer
The existing Trusted Cars wordmark/logo is still visible and not removed
Both logos are properly aligned vertically and spaced on desktop and mobile
On mobile, both logos scale appropriately and fit within the header without overflow

file_operations.description: Add the user's logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/user-logo.dim_200x60.png) to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in the header. Wrap both logos in a flex container to ensure they display side by side with proper spacing and vertical alignment. Ensure responsive behavior on mobile devices so both logos scale and fit without overflow.

Add the user's logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/user-logo.dim_200x60.png) to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in the footer. Wrap both logos in a flex container to ensure they display side by side with proper spacing and vertical alignment. Maintain consistent styling with the header implementation.
